---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or enhancement for my-gpx-activities
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

Describe the feature you'd like to see. What problem does it solve, or what new capability would it enable?

## Motivation

Why is this feature important? What's the use case or user problem it addresses?

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision this feature working? Feel free to describe the user experience, UI changes, API changes, or implementation approach.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this problem? What are the tradeoffs?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples that would help clarify the request.
